title: Credits of EOE at the end of the movie
display_title: Credits of EOE at the end of the movie
wikitext:
[]: Credits of EOE at the end of the movie             Quote Post by RussianRiz » Sat Sep 04, 2021 11:22 am So I'm doing my research to contribute to the wiki, and would like a confirmation from sources and origins. What I do know, is that there is an EoE version where the credits are presented at the end, rather than in the middle, as we are conventionally used to. I would like confirmation of what this version would be. Was it the old American version of the movie, by any chance (Manga Entertainment, I think), or was it from the domestic release from Laserdisc?

[]: Re: Credits of EOE at the end of the movie             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sat Sep 04, 2021 1:50 pm RussianRiz wrote: So I'm doing my research to contribute to the wiki, and would like a confirmation from sources and origins. What I do know, is that there is an EoE version where the credits are presented at the end, rather than in the middle, as we are conventionally used to. I would like confirmation of what this version would be. Was it the old American version of the movie, by any chance (Manga Entertainment, I think), or was it from the domestic release from Laserdisc?

[]: Re: Credits of EOE at the end of the movie             Quote Post by RussianRiz » Sat Sep 04, 2021 2:14 pm Hmm, I didn't know about this difference in Asuka's line. This difference in the video and theatrical versions helps to clarify another changes, such as the credits position and use. Thanks!

[]: Re: Credits of EOE at the end of the movie             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sat Sep 04, 2021 3:46 pm Wait, found it after all. https://wiki.evageeks.org/Guides:Episod ... Evangelion

[]: Re: Credits of EOE at the end of the movie             Quote Post by RussianRiz » Sat Sep 04, 2021 3:50 pm Thank you again. That's just what I was looking for!

[]: Re: Credits of EOE at the end of the movie             Quote Post by mirakodus » Wed Sep 15, 2021 12:50 pm here is the link for video credits: https://easyupload.io/8mdxzl

[]: Re: Credits of EOE at the end of the movie             Quote Post by RussianRiz » Wed Sep 15, 2021 1:26 pm Awesome! Thank you very much for sharing it!
